definition: Boolean that at least one source-hierarchy catalyst timestamp is before signal_date close or before entry decision
Trading days from most recent qualifying catalyst date to signal_date
notes: Used to avoid same-day event chaos and stale catalysts.

definition: Mean dollar volume over first three post-catalyst sessions divided by pre-catalyst 20-day ADV
notes: If signal occurs before the 3-day window is complete candidate is not eligible for this feature.

definition: Mean dollar volume over first five post-catalyst sessions divided by pre-catalyst 20-day ADV
notes: Initial diagnostic only unless spec later chooses 3d or 5d.

definition: Post-catalyst later-window volume divided by immediate post-catalyst volume
notes: Lower values indicate possible exhausted attention.

definition: Signal close divided by catalyst-day close or first post-catalyst close
notes: Tests whether price held above catalyst reference.

definition: Max drawdown from post-catalyst high to signal close
Boolean price remains above catalyst-day open/close reference after event gap
notes: Only when catalyst produced measurable gap.

definition: Frozen XMOM rank score from prior trial
notes: May be used as base ranking input but not refit post hoc.
Risk diagnostic and possible rejection if extreme under frozen threshold.
